tagline: A spiritual pressure hierarchy where reiatsu tier overrides all technique matchups — and the king always wins.
visualizationReason: Bleach's combat system is a strict reiatsu dominance tree: superior spiritual pressure invalidates all lower-level abilities regardless of type matchup. The counter-tree maps how reiatsu tiers override technique-specific counters.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: If you're going to be the light, you'd better not get burned.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: REIATSU DETECTION ACTIVE — SPIRITUAL PRESSURE HIERARCHY ENFORCED

hero.microHook: Your blade reflects your soul — know yourself to know your power.
hero.thesis: Bleach is a reiatsu-dictated combat economy: spiritual pressure hierarchy overrides all technique counters, and only by transcending the reiatsu ceiling can one challenge the system itself.

powerSystem.name: Zanpakuto
powerSystem.subtitle: Soul-Split Blade System
powerSystem.loreDesc: Each Shinigami's sword has a unique name and personality that defines their combat style — bankai unlocks maximum output.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A sealed-capability system: base state is restricted, bankai is the full power unlock, requiring soul-knowledge to activate.

powerSystem.name: Hollowfication
powerSystem.subtitle: Soul Corruption Power-Up
powerSystem.loreDesc: Shinigami who merge with Hollow powers gain enhanced abilities but risk losing their humanity.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A dual-state capability: corruption risk traded for power amplification, with Vizard representing stable hybrid nodes.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Ichigo's Hollow mask first appearing against Ulquiorra.

powerSystem.name: Bankai
powerSystem.subtitle: Maximum Blade Release
powerSystem.loreDesc: The maximum output state of a Zanpakuto — using it drains significant spiritual energy and leaves the user vulnerable.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A high-cost ultimate: maximum combat capability at the cost of sustained energy reserves.

rankings.topTierLore: The supreme capability tier in Bleach.
rankings.topTierSystem: Maximum capability across all measured dimensions.

tiers.name: A-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Exceptional capability holders with system-shaping influence.

tiers.name: B-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Competent operators with meaningful impact potential.

factions.name: Bleach Universe
factions.loreDesc: The primary world of the story.

rules.name: Reiatsu Dictates Combat Outcomes
rules.loreDesc: In Bleach, superior Reiatsu effectively invalidates lower-level abilities — if your spiritual pressure is high enough, enemy attacks simply bounce off you.
rules.systemDesc: A tier-skipping dominance rule: capability ceiling determines matchups more than specific ability matchups.

rules.name: Bankai Cannot Be Used Casually
rules.loreDesc: Bankai is the maximum output state of a Zanpakuto — using it drains significant spiritual energy and leaves the user vulnerable.
rules.systemDesc: A resource constraint on ultimate abilities: high-risk deployment limits strategic options.

counterplay.mechanic: Zanpakuto dominates standard opponents through sealed capability.
counterplay.loreDesc: Zanpakuto proves superior against standard threats.
counterplay.systemDesc: A sealed-capability system: base state is restricted, bankai is the full power unlock, requiring soul-knowledge to activate.

causalEvents.name: Story Begins
causalEvents.trigger: The inciting incident that sets the narrative in motion.
causalEvents.consequence: Protagonist is forced to engage with the system.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The initial condition that creates the narrative premise.

anomalies.name: Unique Capability
anomalies.loreDesc: The protagonist possesses a capability that transcends normal system rules.
anomalies.systemDesc: A system anomaly: Bleach is a reiatsu-dictated combat economy: spiri...
anomalies.impact: Creates asymmetric advantage against normal opponents.

systemQuestions.question: What makes Bleach's system unique?
systemQuestions.answer: A spiritual pressure hierarchy where reiatsu tier overrides all technique matchups — and the king always wins.
